title: Model safe-area-aware preview chrome
summary: Advance the native preview surface so selected device safe-area insets actively shape preview navigation, tab, and modal chrome placement instead of only appearing as inspector metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Preview surface derives reusable chrome geometry from the selected device, orientation, presentation mode, and safe-area inset contract.
Navigation, tab, and dismiss preview affordances respect the derived safe-area chrome geometry on phone and tablet portrait/landscape previews.
Preview contract inspector exposes the applied safe-area chrome offsets so visual review can distinguish modeled geometry from raw inset metadata.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Created from the 2026-07-21 Top 10 runway after HS-0038; highest implementation item is safe-area-aware preview chrome.
Added StudioPreviewChromeGeometry so preview chrome derives top, bottom, and horizontal content guards from the selected device safe-area contract.
Navigation bars, tab bars, full-screen dismiss controls, and sheet chrome now use the derived geometry instead of fixed preview padding.
Preview Contract now exposes applied chrome offsets alongside raw safe-area inset metadata in localized copy.
Validated the edited string catalog as JSON after adding applied chrome strings.
Validated the HS-0040 ticket schema before closure.
Repo contract validation passed with HS-0040 present.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build succeeded after the safe-area chrome model change.
Repo-native native CI wrapper succeeded after the safe-area chrome model change.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 Next Slices 2026-07-21 item 2: model safe-area-aware preview chrome.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Keep this as a truthful geometry model, not a claim of runtime simulator execution.
Use existing preview support types and localized strings before adding new surface patterns.
